name: Old Fashioned Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and core them. Do not peel.
2. Combine the apples and apple juice in a lightly oiled Crock-Pot pot.
3. For each pint of cooked, sieved fruit, add 1 cup sugar, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon allspice, and 1/2 teaspoon cloves. Stir well.
4. Cover and cook on High for 6 to 8 hours, stirring about every 2 hours.
5. Remove the cover after 3 hours to allow the fruit and juice to cook down.
6. Add Sauterne during the last hour of cooking.
7. Spoon into hot sterilized jars and process in a boiling water bath. Seal. Makes about 5 half-pint jars.
